title: Easy Villager Roll
description: Easy Villager Roll is a lightweight Minecraft plugin for Minecraft servers running Paper 1.21+. It adds a button in the villagers GUI, allowing it to be rerolled without having to break it's job-block and replace it saving tons of time.
body: Easy Villager Roll is a lightweight Minecraft plugin for Minecraft servers running Paper 1.21+. It adds a button in your villagers GUI, that resets it's trades instead of having to break it's job-block and replace it saving you tons of time.
